summary: Phase 6 testing complete. All major features working: Admin Dashboard My Report and Executive Reports with period filters (This Month/This Week/Today/Custom), Free Samples in Order and PI creation, Order Detail page bug fix (Order not found resolved), Customer address management after creation, Payment proof and packing images visible in Order Detail, Formulation access control working for admin.
critical_code_review_comments: OrderDetail.js correctly uses `const { orderId: id } = useParams()` to match route param :orderId - bug fixed
AdminDashboard.js correctly uses query param `/reports/telecaller-sales?telecaller_id=${execId}&period=month` for executive reports
FreeSampleModel added to backend and free_samples field properly handled in Order and PI creation
Payment proof images and packing images display with preview modal working in OrderDetail
seed_data_creation: Created test customers and orders with free samples during backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 6 features fully implemented and tested. Key features verified: 1) Admin Dashboard My Report tab with period filters (today/week/month/custom) - uses /reports/telecaller-sales?telecaller_id=X&period=Y API, 2) Admin Dashboard Executive Reports tab with executive selection dropdown and period filters, 3) Order Detail page loads correctly (Order not found bug fixed by changing useParams from {id} to {orderId: id}), 4) Free Samples section in Create Order page with Add Sample button, 5) Free Samples section in PI Builder page, 6) Customer address management - can add addresses after customer creation, 7) Payment proof images visible in Order Detail payment section, 8) Formulation column visible for admin in Order Detail items table, 9) Dispatch lock working for dispatched orders. Route for PI Builder is /proforma not /pi.

order_detail_bug_fix.issue: Order not found error when navigating from All Orders
order_detail_bug_fix.fix: Changed useParams from {id} to {orderId: id} to match route :orderId

free_samples_order.persistence: Verified - samples saved and displayed in Order Detail

order_detail_images.payment_proof_images: Working - visible in payment section with preview

formulation_access_control.packaging: Can see/edit only when global toggle is ON

mocked_apis.gst_verification: /api/gst-verify/{gst_no} - returns state name based on first 2 digits
mocked_apis.pincode_lookup: External API with local fallback mapping for common pincodes
